news.t: Covered Call ETFs Have Boomed – But Can They Be More?
ProShares Launches Russell 2000 High Income ETF

holdings.infoBox: ITWO is an equity ETF with a total of 1902 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Russell 2000 High Income ETF (ITWO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index that holds Russell 2000 stocks and sells daily call options on the same index. The fund primarily uses swaps to replicate the buy-write strategy in replicating returns of the sub-index. ITWO was launched on Sep 4, 2024 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Covered Call ETFs Have Boomed – But Can They Be More?
data.text: Investors have plenty of reasons to celebrate the covered call ETF boom. Covered call strategies have offered new ways to add income to portfolios.

data.title: ProShares Launches Russell 2000 High Income ETF
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares launched the ProShares Russell 2000 High Income ETF (CBOE: ITWO).
